title: Principal Frontend Developer at BSNL Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at BSNL Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
